preamble:
Introduction
The content of this service description (Chapter 1) is used to compile a service catalog that is used in the contract with the client. This introduction and document history below are for internal use only.
It is allowed to merge Chapter 1 with other service descriptions into a single service catalog. Modifying the content of Chapter 1 for individual clients is not allowed. (If necessary, any adjustments can only be made with approval from the responsible service owner of product manager.)

service summary: This Service manages all aspects related to <klant>’s iSeries implementation hosted at Cegeka.
standard service components:
iSeries OS management
Patching & Lifecycle management
This service doesn’t include:
Backup & Restore management
This feature contains:
Physical iSeries Management
This feature contains:
eligibility and prerequisites:
Conditions
The Cegeka managed services personnel needs to have network access to the Managed iSeries Server.
The Cegeka managed services personnel needs to have a login with full administrative access on the Managed iSeries Server.

Monitoring & Reporting
This feature is focused on status and availability monitoring and includes:
The list of standard monitoring settings and the list of monitored system parameters are documented in a standard monitoring plan. This is used as a basis for a customized monitoring plan to fit the needs of <klant>.
<klant> has an insight in the outcome of monitoring by means of monthly reports. An external monitoring portal can be provided as an option to <klant>.
order & billing information:
Part numbers
O.0140_0010_0010_M_S.000 SPH platform management - Shared Power Hosting - platform management
O.0300_0010_0010_A_S.000 Single Datacenter - Virtual Server Resources (IBM i  / IOS) - IBM i; sytem unit single datacenter / 76 CPW / 1 GB Ram / unlimited i5 OS V7Rx + user licenses / BU agent License (BRMS) / (minimum 7 units per partition required)
O.0320_0060_0010_A_S.000 Single Datacenter - Storage (IBM i  / IOS) - Managed SAN capacity  / GB (single storage system/datacenter) - High End (FS900 Flash) (S-T0) (Min 200 GiB + extra 50 GiB blocks)
O.0340_0060_0010_A_S.000 Backup (IBM i  / IOS) - LPAR back-up - per GB used (compressed) space on back-up storage device (EMC² data domain) (Min 200 GiB + extra 50 GiB blocks) - Storage Replication
Measurement
A report is generated on a monthly basis, this report is based on the CMDB and lists all servers and service details for which a Cegeka datacentre – Managed iSeries OS Service is delivered.
Billing
The units are billed against the price of their respective SKU’s.
(“Price/Unit” x “Quantity of Virtual – Gold Units”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Quantity of Virtual – Silver Units”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Quantity of Virtual – Bronze Units”).
